name: ai-patterns
description: Tell-tale patterns AI codegen commonly leaves behind. This pack is the moving target — extend it as AI tools change.

rules.message: @ts-ignore / @ts-nocheck suppresses a real type error instead of fixing it — a classic AI escape hatch.
Explicit `any` defeats type safety — AI reaches for it when unsure of the real type.
Leftover console.log/debug — AI scaffolding output left in production code.
Empty catch block swallows errors silently — AI writes these to make code 'work'.
